title: Wysiwyg
lyrics: Oh yeah, I've been looking for it all night Looking at your ebbs and flows Wondering which way you roll If it comes back to that Tell me you're ready for whatever You hear that? Feeling that Feeling that Girl, why you looking like that? Titties out and an ass so fat I ain't tripping and all about that It's what you do, it's what you do Oh, when you're looking so good It's like a memory of things we should How many times we skip this part But maybe we can get right to where it starts Got pleasure in me And pleasure in you Does it come from within Or is it just our foundational view? I said, girl, why you looking so goddamn good? I mean, just a little, it wouldn't hurt Anybody, anywhere And if it did, fuck them, man, I don't care It's our experience, you know Girl, why you looking like that? Titties out and an ass so fat I ain't tripping and all about that It's what you do, it's what you do Girl, why you looking like that? Titties out and an ass so fat I ain't tripping and all about that It's what you do, it's what you do What you do when you're close to me What you do when you're flying with me What you do when you realize It's just the cover inside that we're Switching up and the end Coming right in the bends Coming wrong on the different levels That we know we could go Cause it's a stereo sound Rocking inside a brain I can't see light here without your membrane Inside of my disaster Nine, nine, nine What's the next level? Is it you? Is it me? Is it treacherous to even think that it could be complete? Because Girl, why you looking like that? Titties out and an ass so fat I ain't tripping and all about that It's what you do, it's what you do Girl, why you looking like that? Titties out and an ass so fat I ain't tripping and all about that It's what it do, it's what it do What it do for you What it do for me Is it a fracture of what life was supposed to be Inside of the fruit, but I think you're looking good You got me Thinking about my members Swollen inside of what we can't remember No December, no summer, no drought Girl, can you hear me? It's the truth, I said Hands up Throw your hands up If you believe, believe in me Believe in you To get down, get down to the level Understand where our mind goes When the devil comes and eats us From the inside You're better than what you think, ay You're better than what you bring, ay You're better than the dark negative Thoughts that come along with being so amazing And your life, make your body Got me going all night long Don't worry, it's just your soul carcass Let it go Let it all go and feel the flow Girl, why you looking so good? You got me planning my future history If you would, yeah Girl, why you looking so good? Kitty's out and her ass so fat I ain't tripping, it ain't all about that It's what you do It's what you do with it If God gave you all that God gave you all that Inside your mind, you know you're just Crumbling if you don't understand it You're all that forever and ever From day one to day zero, ay Oh, I want you to know When I took you home Monday through Friday To Saturday to Sunday To tell you that you're Beautiful every day That's how you treat your woman Let me hear you say Tell her that she's Fucking beautiful every day So girl, why you looking so damn good? Kitty's out and her ass so good I know you give it just to me And I wish that I could Have the courage to share Cause everybody should have A piece of amazing like you Inside of their doom I swear to God, it's all doom But if you're swearing to God You're swearing to yourself Can I get an amen? Amen, boy, amen, boy No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no We don't do that We don't do five minutes Remember when you said that? Five minutes It's like, no, you're just a You're a, you're a felon We don't like that around here, okay? We don't like that around here, Michael We don't do that Did that man just say Kitty's on the stream? Shut him down now Shut him the fuck down Do you hear me? Shut him down now He forgot the fucking The mouse again Okay And as you will soon find out People in, in, um, party land Uh, that, uh My confidence lacks And it's tragic So then afterwards I'm just like awkward And be like, listen Listen, I didn't really mean What I said, like listen If you felt appalled By anything I said Like I didn't mean it Um, I meant it in the kindest Kindest, most generous way ever Like Hey girl, what's up?  I'm sorry I don't know Right?  Are you still live right now? Yeah, I'm talking to myself Always and forever Oh
